title: EDPB meets with EU Commissioner McGrath and adopts common data breach notification template
summary: Brussels, 10 June – During its latest plenary, the EDPB met with Michael McGrath, Commissioner for Democracy, Justice, the Rule of Law and Consumer Protection. In addition, the Board has adopted a common data breach notification template. The Board held a meeting with Commissioner McGrath, engaging...
